final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign.

Style/medium: needs a "促销海报" (promotional poster) aesthetic with layered typography — references in the spirit of David Carson 1990s editorial typography, contemporary e-commerce campaign visuals (Alibaba / Amazon Prime Day), Swiss International Style poster heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include layered/stacked typography arrangement, must include a product or subject partially overlapping/obscuring some text elements
Subject: must include a product or main subject as focal point that blocks portions of the typography
Scene/backdrop: needs a promotional campaign atmosphere — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs vibrant promotional direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs polished commercial surface treatment — exact sheen and weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include artistic/display typography with Chinese characters for promotional messaging
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 ratio, must include stacked/layered fonts, must have product overlapping text, must maintain visual complexity without appearing cluttered
Avoid: must avoid chaotic/unreadable layout, must avoid flat/unlayered typography
